message:
feat(core): add expected-loss policy controller types (ft-2p9cb.4.3.1)

PolicyAction (Hold/Tighten/Relax/Shed), SystemState, LossEntry,
PolicyControllerConfig with asymmetric loss matrix, PolicyDecision,
PolicyController with critical floor, hysteresis, expected-loss
minimization. 21 unit tests (525 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
